roles.title: Full-Stack Developer
roles.subtitle: End-to-end development expertise
roles.description: Comprehensive CV showcasing full-stack capabilities across frontend, backend, and infrastructure
roles.summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience building scalable web applications and microservices. Specialized in React, TypeScript, Spring Boot, and GraphQL. Proven track record of delivering high-performance systems serving millions of users with 99.9% uptime.

roles.title: Frontend Engineer
roles.subtitle: React & UI/UX specialist
roles.description: Focused CV highlighting frontend expertise, React ecosystem, and developer experience
roles.summary: Frontend Engineer with deep expertise in React, TypeScript, and modern web development. Experienced in building scalable microfrontend architectures, optimizing build performance, and delivering exceptional user experiences. Passionate about developer experience and performance engineering.

roles.title: Backend Engineer
roles.subtitle: APIs & distributed systems
roles.description: Backend-focused CV emphasizing API development, database optimization, and system design
roles.summary: Backend Engineer specializing in building high-performance APIs and distributed systems. Expert in Spring Boot, GraphQL, and PostgreSQL. Proven ability to architect solutions handling 8,000+ RPS with sub-100ms latency. Strong focus on reliability, observability, and scalable architecture.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.subtitle: CI/CD & infrastructure
roles.description: DevOps-oriented CV focusing on CI/CD, Kubernetes, and build infrastructure
roles.summary: DevOps Engineer with hands-on experience in Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud infrastructure. Led migration of 600+ package monorepo build system achieving 65-70% improvement. Expert in GitHub Actions, Concourse, and container orchestration with strong focus on developer experience.
